steps.title: Combine constant terms on the left
steps.content:
Add the numbers on the left side of the equation: $25 + 35 = 60$.
The equation becomes $$60 + x = 125$$

steps.title: Isolate x and solve
steps.content:
Subtract 60 from both sides:
$$x = 125 - 60 = 65$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
